channel.title: Existential Supplies Co. Product Feed
channel.description: Catalog feed for Meiro CDP product recommendations, affinity models, and campaign personalization.

item.g:title: Monday Survival Kit
item.g:description: A composed little object for surviving workplace rituals while appearing beautifully prepared. Finished in calm packaging, restrained copy, and enough plausible utility to anchor a very real customer journey.

item.g:title: Executive Decision Dice
item.g:description: A composed little object for surviving workplace rituals while appearing beautifully prepared. Finished in calm packaging, restrained copy, and enough plausible utility to anchor a very real customer journey.

item.g:title: Parenting Chaos First Aid Box
item.g:description: Designed for tiny domestic emergencies, large feelings, and the mysterious physics of school mornings. Finished in calm packaging, restrained copy, and enough plausible utility to anchor a very real customer journey.

item.g:description: Designed for tiny domestic emergencies, large feelings, and the mysterious physics of school mornings. Finished in calm packaging, restrained copy, and enough plausible utility to anchor a very real customer journey.

item.g:description: A softer way to tell your body the day has technically ended. Finished in calm packaging, restrained copy, and enough plausible utility to anchor a very real customer journey.

item.g:title: Premium Overthinking Blanket
item.g:description: For people who say they are fine with the confidence of a collapsing spreadsheet. Finished in calm packaging, restrained copy, and enough plausible utility to anchor a very real customer journey.

item.g:item_group_id: Gifts for People Who Say “I’m Fine”
item.g:title: I’m Fine Care Parcel
item.g:description: The thoughtful gift that says: I noticed the subtext and brought supplies. Finished in calm packaging, restrained copy, and enough plausible utility to anchor a very real customer journey.
